channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Victor Wembanyama expected to miss remainder of season after blood clot diagnosis, Spurs announce
item.description: San Antonio Spurs star Victor Wembanyama is expected to miss the remainder of the NBA regular season after being diagnosed with a blood clot in his right shoulder, the Spurs announced Thursday. It's a massive blow to the Spurs, who are contending for a playoff spot in the Western Conference.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Tiger Woods joins another White House meeting as PGA Tour moves closer to Saudi deal
item.description: Tiger Woods joined PGA Tour Commissioner Jay Monahan and player director Adam Scott in a second White House meeting on Thursday, another sign the sport is moving rapidly toward ending the division brought on by Saudi-funded LIV Golf.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Mike Collier, Super Bowl champion with Steelers, dead at 71
item.description: Super Bowl champion Mike Collier died at 71 years old on Sunday in Hagerstown, Maryland. Collier won Super Bowl X with the Pittsburgh Steelers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Milwaukee's Bobby Portis suspended after he mistakenly took painkiller Tramadol rather than Toradol
item.description: The NBA has suspended Milwaukee forward Bobby Portis Jr. for 25 games without pay because he tested positive for the painkiller Tramadol, a violation of the league’s anti-drug program.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: 4 Nations Face-Off is the latest in a long line of memorable international hockey competitions
item.description: The 4 Nations Face-Off has already delivered an instant classic international hockey game with the fight-filled preliminary round matchup between the United States and Canada last week in Montreal. The U.S.-Canada rematch on Thursday night in Boston could be another memorable country vs.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: USA-Canada rivalry takes center stage in 4 Nations Face-Off final: What to know
item.description: USA and Canada to battle for the 4 Nations Face-Off championship on Thursday night. Here's what you need to know about the heated rivalry.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sponsor invite Akie Iwai leads the LPGA Thailand golf tournament by 3 strokes after 10-under 62
item.description: PATTAYA, Thailand (AP) — Akie Iwai made the best of a sponsor's invite to shoot a 10-under 62 and lead by three strokes after the first round of the LPGA's Thailand tournament at Siam Country Club's Pattaya Old Course.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sharks’ top goalie prospect leaves San Jose Barracuda game with injury
item.description: San Jose Barracuda goalie Yaroslav Askarov left Wednesday night’s game against the Ontario Reign in the first period
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Hornets stun Lakers 100-97 after Luka struggles and LeBron misses 2 late shots to tie it
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Miles Bridges scored 29 points, LaMelo Ball added 27 and the Charlotte Hornets stunned LeBron James and Luka Doncic with a 100-97 victory over the Los Angeles Lakers on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How Central Girls Wrestling reached the pinnacle of Colorado Wrestling
item.description:
Central Girls Wrestling, aka D51 Phoenix, featuring girls from all four D51 high schools, has done it.
They are the cream of the crop.
The top of the heap.
The best in the state.
They are the undisputed 5A State Champions.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: This rookie QB card could be worth $50K if you pull it from a new Topps set
item.description: Denver Broncos rookie quarterback Bo Nix impressed on the field, and now a Colorado sports card store is ready to pay $50,000 to keep a unique card featuring him close to home.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kristensen, Fox 5

item.title: Transgender politician who defeated 12-year-old girl in race defends trans inclusion in women's sports
item.description: Nathanielle Morin, Canadian advisor to the Federal Minister of Women, released a statement defending trans participation in women's sports, taking aim at Trump.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Girls Soccer: San Marcos 2, Cathedral 2
item.description: A tight battle between regional powers in the Open Division of girls soccer between San Marcos and Cathedral.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: Chargers to play 2025 regular season opener in Brazil
item.description: The Eagles and Packers traveled to South America to compete in the first-ever NFL game in South America. The league will return to the continent in September.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Padres fans unite to restore North Park mural defaced by Dodgers graffiti
item.description: North Park residents are rallying to restore a beloved San Diego Padres mural in the neighborhood after it was defaced last month with blue spray paint, suggestive of the rival Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Cooper Flagg’s popularity in men’s basketball could compare to Caitlin Clark’s in women’s, college coach says
item.description: Cooper Flagg is projected to be the No. 1 pick in this year's NBA Draft, but Illinois coach Brad Underwood says he could revitalize the college game if he stays.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL projects salary cap between $277.5M and $281.5M in 2025, rising by as much as $26M
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The NFL salary cap will be between $277.5 million and $281.5 million for the 2025 season, rising as much as $26 million from last year. The bump is great news for Cincinnati, which is hoping to sign receiver Tee Higgins to a long-term contract.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Justin Herbert, Chargers will play their 2025 season opener in Brazil
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles Chargers will play their 2025 season opener in Brazil, making the franchise the first to play on five continents, the NFL announced Wednesday. The Chargers' opponent is expected to be announced in May, when the NFL's regular-season schedule is released.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former Ohio State player Ben Christman's cause of death revealed
item.description: The 21-year-old from Akron died on Feb. 11, one day before his 22nd birthday at an off-campus residence near the University of Nevada Las Vegas.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, NewsNation

item.title: Aggies lose heartbreaker at first place New Mexico
item.description: ALBUQUERQUE (ABC4 Sports) - With first place in the Mountain West men’s basketball standings on the line, Utah State (22-4, 12-3 MW) fell just short on Sunday in Albuquerque, dropping an 82-79 thriller at The Pit. This marked the second time in two weeks the Aggies have lost to the Lobos.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Trump to attend NASCAR's Daytona 500 for the second time as president
item.description: Donald Trump is planning to attend Sunday's Daytona 500 for the second time as president and help further burnish his image as a sports fan.
item.dc:creator: Darlene Superville, WFLA, NBC

item.title: The new NBA All-Star format is here, and Sunday night will show whether it works
item.description: This will be an actual All-Star matchup. On one side, there's a team with 86 combined All-Star selections, $2.7 billion in on-court earnings and where every single player on the team is either an NBA champion, an Olympic gold medalist, or both.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Suzuki and Counsell are working on their communication in spring training with the Cubs
item.description: MESA, Ariz. (AP) — Seiya Suzuki is working on his communication with Craig Counsell, and the manager says it's his fault. Suzuki joined the rest of the Chicago Cubs for their first full-squad workout of spring training on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz fall to Clippers in final game before All-Star break
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Norman Powell scored a season-high 41 points and James Harden added 32 to lift the Los Angeles Clippers to a 120-116 overtime victory over the Utah Jazz on Thursday night. Harden also had 10 rebounds, seven assists and three steals.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: CMU Swimming continues dominance at RMAC Championships
item.description: The Mesa Mavericks are gearing up for Nationals next month, putting their talent on full display at the RMAC Championships
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: CMU Men's Wrestling "Battle in Brownson" recap
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) —Western Colorado Tops Colorado Mesa in ‘Battle in Brownson’ In a heated rivalry matchup inside Brownson Arena, the Colorado Mesa Mavericks faced off against the Western Colorado Mountaineers in the annual Battle in Brownson.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5
